name: popyAlive
short_description: The game has a high level of strategy and skill, and players need to move flexibly and use various weapons and tactics to deal with different levels and enemies.
detailed_description: Protagonist: Poppy and his friends conquer levels together and fight against the boss! Press ↑↓← → to control direction, use keyboard Z to attack enemies. Shooting challenge game is a game with shooting as the main gameplay, where players need to shoot enemies to pass levels. The game has a high level of strategy and skill, and players need to move flexibly, use various weapons and tactics to deal with different levels and enemies.
